security.no_password_sub: Anyone on your network can open this panel.

queries.title: Query Log
queries.subtitle: Recent DNS queries
queries.clear_confirm: This will permanently delete all query log entries.

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Top DNS clients — retained history
clients.filter_placeholder: Filter by name, IP or MAC…

blocklist.title: Blocklist
blocklist.subtitle: Blacklist and whitelist management
blocklist.full_check_hint: Matched sources and routing are on the Tools page.

lists.title: Subscription Lists
lists.subtitle: Remote blocklist feeds
lists.remove_confirm: Remove subscription list "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

dns.title: Custom DNS Records
dns.subtitle: Local A / AAAA / CNAME overrides. Wildcards supported: *.home.lan

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime controls and persisted service configuration
settings.restarting: Server is restarting — waiting for it to come back…
settings.live_changes_sub: These values are patched into the running service immediately.
settings.restart_changes: Saved to disk, then the supervisor brings Ferrite back.
settings.restart_changes_sub: Listener and cache sizing changes require the service to restart.
settings.min_ttl_sub: Minimum TTL for cached DNS responses (s)
settings.max_ttl_sub: Maximum TTL for cached DNS responses (s)
settings.log_retention_sub: Delete query log entries older than N days; 0 = keep forever
settings.api_key_set: Currently set — enter new value to replace
settings.access_sub: Credentials and API key used by the web UI and external clients
settings.password_sub: Web UI login password; leave blank to keep current
settings.web_dir_sub: Override web assets path; blank = default
settings.blocking_enabled_sub: Master switch for DNS blocking; allowed DNS and logging keep running
settings.debug_logging_sub: Verbose logs for diagnosing issues. On by default; turn off if too noisy. Applied immediately.
settings.log_ignore_sub: Domains matching these patterns are resolved normally but hidden from the query log
settings.no_patterns: No patterns — all queries are logged
settings.dns_bind_sub: Address and port for the DNS listener
settings.cache_size_sub: Maximum number of cached DNS entries
settings.dns_dnssec_sub: Set the DO bit and forward signatures. Enforcement needs a validating resolver over DoT/DoH.
settings.dns_strip_ecs_sub: Strip EDNS Client Subnet from upstream queries so the resolver never learns the client's subnet.
settings.blocklist_cache_size_sub: Recent block/allow decisions kept in RAM
settings.api_bind_sub: Address and port for the HTTP API / web UI
settings.upstream_resolvers_sub: Default DNS resolvers used when no local zone route matches
settings.upstream_sub: Replace the full upstream list. Plain DNS is enough for most LAN/router setups.
settings.upstream_egress_help: Send this resolver's queries through the tunnel. Falls back to direct if the tunnel is down.
settings.zone_routing_sub: Route LAN names and reverse-DNS zones to a specific resolver
settings.zones_sub: Docker bridge mode usually needs a LAN reverse-DNS zone routed to the router DNS.
settings.zones_empty: No explicit zones. Ferrite will use the default upstream resolver list.
settings.panel_sub: Built-in DNS shortcut for the Ferrite web UI
settings.panel_enabled_sub: Serve the built-in panel domain as a local A record
settings.panel_domain_sub: Domain answered by Ferrite, usually fe.te
settings.panel_ipv4_sub: Host/LAN IP to return in Docker bridge mode; blank = auto-detect
settings.panel_url_sub: Display URL for logs and copied links; useful when the web UI runs on a non-80 port
settings.current_config_sub: Raw server config, collapsed until needed
settings.updates_sub: Server and web UI release checks
settings.updates_empty: No update check has been run yet.
settings.restart_timeout: Server did not come back after restart. Reload the page to retry.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.password_empty: Password cannot be empty. Disable password login instead.
errors.password_hash_failed: Could not save the new password.
errors.api_key_empty: API key cannot be empty. Clear it instead.
errors.dns_min_ttl_range: Minimum DNS TTL must be between 0 and 86,400 seconds.
errors.dns_max_ttl_range: Maximum DNS TTL must be between 0 and 86,400 seconds.
errors.dns_ttl_order: Minimum DNS TTL cannot be greater than maximum DNS TTL.
errors.blocklist_cache_size: Blocklist cache size must be greater than 0.
errors.upstream_empty: Add at least one upstream DNS server.
errors.invalid_client_bypass: Client filtering bypass must contain only valid IP or MAC addresses.
errors.client_identity_required: Provide either an IP address or a MAC address.
errors.invalid_client_key: Client must be a valid IP address or MAC address.
errors.web_update_incompatible: This web UI update requires a different server version.

tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: DNS, filtering and WHOIS lookups plus egress, certificate and TCP probes — run from the server through its own resolvers and tunnels.
tools.egress_check_help: Connect out through a tunnel and report the observed exit IP.
tools.domain_check_help: Check whether a domain would be filtered, why, and where its traffic routes.

tunnels.title: Tunnels
tunnels.subtitle: Route chosen domains through a tunnel or proxy. Matching domains resolve to ferrite, which forwards them through the selected egress.
tunnels.no_egresses: No egresses yet. Add a Direct or SOCKS5 egress to route through.
tunnels.no_rules: No rules. A plain domain (example.com) routes it and all its subdomains; *.example.com routes subdomains only.
tunnels.no_known_devices: No devices seen yet — they appear once they query.
tunnels.evasion_help: Splits the TLS ClientHello across TCP segments so SNI-based DPI can't read the host name. Leave blank to split automatically inside the SNI.
tunnels.wg_hidden_hint: The PrivateKey is shown masked (********). Leave it as-is to keep the stored key, or paste a fresh .conf to replace it.
tunnels.buffer_over: {{buf}} KB across parallel downloads can exceed the egress's shared kernel UDP buffer (~{{max}} KB) — media may stall mid-load. Raise it: sudo sysctl -w net.core.rmem_max={{rec}} (or use a smaller buffer).
tunnels.kernel_buffer: Kernel UDP buffer ≈ {{max}} KB (raise net.core.rmem_max for more)
tunnels.general_sub: Master switch and how ferrite advertises itself to matching clients.
tunnels.enabled_sub: Route matching domains through a tunnel; everything else resolves normally.
tunnels.advertise_ipv4_sub: IPv4 that matching domains resolve to. Blank auto-detects this box's address.
tunnels.advertise_ipv6_sub: IPv6 to advertise alongside IPv4. Optional.
tunnels.max_connections_sub: Upper bound on simultaneously tunneled connections.
tunnels.egresses_sub: The tunnels and proxies traffic can be routed through.
tunnels.rules_sub: Which domains route through which egress, and for which devices.
tunnels.fail_closed_hint: Drop traffic when the egress is down.
tunnels.pattern_help: A plain domain matches it and all subdomains; *.example.com matches subdomains only. Fail-closed drops traffic when the egress is down.

logs.title: Logs
logs.subtitle: Recent server log records (in-memory; newest at the bottom).
